basics.name: Weiren Zhao
basics.label: Ph.D. Student in Informatics
basics.summary: Ph.D. student specializing in the intersection of machine learning, chemistry, and biological data. I possess a solid background in deep learning development and excel at leveraging PyTorch, GNNs, and custom attention models to solve complex modeling problems in biochemical systems.

education.description: Focus: Machine Learning & Metabolic Modeling. Laboratory of Prof. Tatsuya Akutsu.
State Key Laboratory of Fine Chemicals.

work.name: Kyoto University
work.summary: Interkcat Model Development and High-Performance Computing.
highlights: Leveraged PyTorch to optimize advanced neural network architectures, achieving high-precision prediction of enzyme catalytic activity.
Accelerated the training of Protein Language Models via CUDA-based GPU parallel computing.

work.name: Dalian University of Technology
work.summary: Machine Learning-based Catalyst Design and Reaction Prediction.
highlights: Developed a clustering algorithm based on physicochemical descriptors to precisely identify solvent candidates.
Developed Python scripts to automatically crawl and analyze academic papers in the field of perovskite solar cells.

publications.name: Beyond Rapid Nucleation: Unveiling the Role of Solvent-Precursor Interactions in Antisolvent-Free Perovskite Fabrication
Designing Buchwald–Hartwig Reaction Graph for Yield Prediction
